_meta.description: Navigation mapping from Cadence surfaces to QiLife routes
_meta.attribution: Based on Cadence by Wesley Swart, MIT License © 2026

surfaces.cadence_description: Two-column command centre: today's tasks, this week's progress, upcoming deadlines, pipeline, projects
surfaces.notes: QiLife home exists. Cadence's stat-card dashboard and briefing patterns should be evaluated for adoption.
QiLife's capture flow serves a similar purpose. Cadence's reminder/snooze pattern could enhance it.

surfaces.cadence_description: Diary view of today's daily note with quick-add tasks
surfaces.notes: Obsidian-specific daily note integration. QiLife could build a 'Today' view showing today's actions and QiBits.

surfaces.cadence_description: Mon–Sun week grid across daily notes
surfaces.notes: No calendar view in QiLife. Low priority unless time-based action scheduling is added.

surfaces.cadence_description: Projects Dashboard with stats, kanban, and widgets
surfaces.notes: QiLife threads list is simpler. Cadence's dashboard stat-grid and widget system are worth evaluating.

surfaces.cadence_description: Card grid with milestones and progress
surfaces.notes: QiLife threads list. Cadence's project card grid with progress bars is a strong candidate for adoption.

surfaces.cadence_description: Kanban board with drag-and-drop stage mutations
surfaces.notes: Pipeline not in QiLife. But the kanban CSS patterns are reusable for thread/action boards.
Both systems have contact/person list views. Cadence's sortable table with inline actions is a good reference.
QiLife timeline serves a similar purpose to Cadence's activity view.

cadence_nav_groups.group_notes: Entire PRM module is out of QiLife scope. No mappings.

surfaces.cadence_description: Completion rate, streaks, focus blocks, journal volume
surfaces.notes: QiLife could build a similar productivity report over Actions and QiBits. Good future feature.

surfaces.cadence_description: Relationship graph between all entity types
surfaces.notes: Compelling for QiLife's people/thread/qibit relationships. Consider for v2.
Entity template management. Useful if QiLife adds customizable entity schemas.
Both have settings. Cadence's module toggle pattern (enable/disable CRM/PRM/Planner) is relevant.

mapping_status_legend.direct: Clear 1:1 mapping between Cadence surface and QiLife route
mapping_status_legend.partial: QiLife has equivalent but with different scope/features
mapping_status_legend.conceptual: Similar purpose but fundamentally different implementation
mapping_status_legend.no_equivalent: No QiLife counterpart exists or is planned
mapping_status_legend.future_candidate: No current equivalent, but good candidate for future development

adoptable_patterns_legend.stat_grid: Dashboard stat cards with accent bands — CSS + layout reusable
adoptable_patterns_legend.kanban_board_css: Kanban column/card layout — CSS reusable, use React DnD for logic
adoptable_patterns_legend.entity_table: Sortable entity list table — CSS + column pattern reusable
adoptable_patterns_legend.project_card_grid: Auto-fit grid of project cards — CSS reusable
adoptable_patterns_legend.capture_modal: Two-column entity creation modal — layout pattern reusable
adoptable_patterns_legend.two_column_layout: Two-column dashboard layout — CSS grid reusable
adoptable_patterns_legend.briefing_component: Daily briefing with tone-colored rows — CSS reusable
